title: BSP IDMAC completion cleanup audit
observations: BSP completion cleanup clears IDST, disables IDIE, soft-resets DMAC, resets DMAIF, clears GCTRL DMA enable, resets FIFO, waits for DMA ownership release, and unmaps DMA.
The local diagnostic branch performs the same relevant IDMAC/DMAIF/GCTRL/FIFO cleanup sequence and logs before and after cleanup.
These operations happen after completion or error handling, while the current failure is before descriptor word 0 is consumed.
No missing pre-transfer reset or descriptor ownership step was found.
reason: Completion cleanup cannot explain the first-descriptor-fetch stall, and the relevant BSP cleanup sequence is already represented locally.
next: Do not retest completion cleanup as a descriptor-fetch fix without new evidence for a pre-transfer reset requirement.
